acceptance_criteria: Every source Atelier/Lens-adjacent stub is represented by a source-backed preservation row.
CKC is preserved as an evolved sibling of Atelier/Lens and prompt-diary intent, not treated as a competing app.
The overlap matrix maps CKC clusters to Handshake owners across Atelier/Lens, Photo Studio, Studio runtime, Loom/media/archive, artifact, and visual-debug surfaces.
Every CKC evolved or convenience feature is classified as fold, dependency, defer, conflict, or operator-decision-needed.
CKC runtime assumptions are translated to Handshake PostgreSQL/EventLedger/ArtifactStore/CRDT/promotion boundaries.

SQLite is forbidden in Handshake runtime, tests, fixtures, mocks, examples, fallbacks, cache, compatibility adapters, temporary harnesses, imports, exports, and product paths. PostgreSQL/EventLedger/ArtifactStore are the only accepted storage and evidence direction.
Electron IPC, CKC localhost intake authority, .GOV product outputs, and CKC product namespace authority are rejected or translated.
Future CKC rebuild stubs are deferred until this packet, CKC greenroom review, and CKC research basis are complete.
The packet is detailed enough for no-context model execution and validator review without rereading all legacy stubs.
Packet, refinement, microtask, taskboard, traceability, inventory, and projection contracts validate with the packet truth bundle.

evolved_feature_rows.feature: Stable public character IDs separate from internal IDs
evolved_feature_rows.why: Operator-facing character identity needs stable labels without leaking storage keys.

evolved_feature_rows.feature: Typed character sheet parser with union and block-list fields
evolved_feature_rows.why: CKC solved real sheet editing pain with typed fields, descriptor fallbacks, score normalization, and nested block editing.

evolved_feature_rows.feature: Append-only sheet versions with selective apply/revert
evolved_feature_rows.why: Prevents data loss when models or imports update sheets.
Daily library work requires multi-select, bulk tags/fields, batch exports, trash, and restore.
CKC moved beyond one-off import into recoverable review work.
Contact sheets are useful for comparing generated or curated media and for handoff.

evolved_feature_rows.feature: OpenPose sidecars hidden from normal galleries
evolved_feature_rows.why: Sidecars are production artifacts but clutter normal viewing unless projected intentionally.
Operator needs PoseKit to operate on collections and individual photos, not only a single character page.
CKC already hardened an OpenPose-compatible pose representation useful for ComfyUI and image production.
Fine control over generated character pose was an evolved production need.
Stable identity references are directly tied to character consistency and ComfyUI workflows.
Real pose workflow needs multiple drafts open without deleting stored rigs.
CKC already closed the loop from generation output back into character/media lineage.

evolved_feature_rows.feature: Workflow spec registry and image-sourcing adapter
evolved_feature_rows.why: External generation/sourcing task output needs versioned ingestion and idempotency.
Prevents character names or sensitive sheet fields from leaking into paths or events.

evolved_feature_rows.feature: Global search with snippets and jump targets
evolved_feature_rows.why: Fast retrieval across sheets, notes, images, and moodboards is core Lens behavior.

evolved_feature_rows.feature: Tag manager, saved searches, palettes, dHash similarity
evolved_feature_rows.why: Convenience features became library-scale navigation requirements.
Prompt diaries and visual planning need more than static notes.

evolved_feature_rows.feature: Built-in model manual and command map
evolved_feature_rows.why: Lets no-context models operate the product.
CKC evolved toward multi-agent operation before Handshake's kernel reset.
Model-driven GUI verification must be quiet and reproducible.
Real media libraries drift; deletion must be reversible and explainable.

evolved_feature_rows.feature: Backup version traceability and orphan adoption
evolved_feature_rows.why: Recovery became a first-class operator need.

evolved_feature_rows.feature: Web portfolio and share pack exports
evolved_feature_rows.why: Operator needs portable handoff outputs.
CKC discovered the right boundary: not everything needs CRDT, but parallel edits need receipts and revisions.
Unfinished work is still requirement evidence: draggable calibration, missing-marker placement, 3D/live split editing, forked history.

no_sqlite_rule: SQLite is forbidden in Handshake runtime, tests, fixtures, mocks, examples, fallbacks, cache, compatibility adapters, temporary harnesses, imports, exports, and product paths. PostgreSQL/EventLedger/ArtifactStore are the only accepted storage and evidence direction.

overlap_rows.overlap_area: Docs, stories, moodboards, prompt diary intent
Exports, backups, share packs, web portfolio

preserve: CRDT only for safe merge shapes

risks: SQLite backdoor through tests or fixtures.
CKC runtime copied instead of translated.

research_basis.pattern: Image pipeline receipts need explicit output file, filename prefix, subfolder, and workflow prompt context; Handshake should map this into ArtifactStore/EventLedger receipts.
ComfyUI integration must tolerate node API evolution and should use an adapter boundary instead of embedding CKC assumptions.
research_basis.source: ComfyUI V3 custom node migration documentation

research_basis.pattern: Community workflows preserve generation metadata in output images; Handshake should preserve prompt/workflow metadata as explicit artifact provenance.
Pose sidecars need stable schemas for body, face, and hand keypoints; CKC PoseKit should become a Handshake pose artifact contract.
Visual/debug surfaces should be reproducible through deterministic snapshots and explicit evidence paths for model review.
Parallel model edits should flow through CRDT-friendly document and artifact boundaries instead of single-owner desktop state.
Search/tag/similarity features can start PostgreSQL-first with full-text search before specialized vector or media indexes.
Window/tab/workspace behavior should translate to Handshake/Tauri-controlled surfaces rather than CKC Electron IPC authority.

translation_conflicts.ckc_assumption: SQLite, FTS5, runtime DDL, SQL translator, db/codex.db fixtures
